S.O. 5133(E).— Whereas the Government of India in the Ministry of Water Resources vide its notification number S, , 169 ) dated the 2nd April, 1986 constituted the Ravi and Boas Waters Tribunal for verification and adjudication of 'n ma ers referred therein, and the said Tribunal forwarded its report to the Central Govemment on 30th January, 1987; And Whereas, further references have been made by the Central Government to the said Tribunal on 19th August, l9tl7 requrtmg explanation and guidance on the report aforesaid, > And whereas, considering the enormous exercise undertaken by the said Tribunal in completing its further report, the Ceritml deerrunent extended the period of making the said report, from time to time, till the 5th February, 2006 vide Notificatim ofthe Government ofIndia inthe Ministry of Water Resources No. 5.0, 1093(E) dated the 4th August, 2005; And whereas, the Central Government keeping in view the exigencies ofthe work involved, as pointed out by the said Tribunal considers it necessary to extend the said period for another six months after the 5th February, 2006; Now, therefore, in exercise ofthe powers conferred by the proviso to sub-section (3) of Section 5 of the Inter-State Rt er Water Disputes Act, 1956 (33 of 1956). the Central Government hereby further extends the period, within which the Tri unal day forward its report on the references so made, to the Central Government till the 5th day of August, 2006, and for t purpose makes the following further amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of W'. erReeburces No. 5.0. 1093(E) dated the 4th August, 2005, namely:— Inthb said notificationin the last paragraph, for the words, figures and letters “till the 5thday of February, 2006”, the words, figures and letters “till the 5th day of August, 2006” shall be substituted, ' [F.No, 15/3/85-I.T.] J HARI NARAYAN, Secy Note— The principal notification consutututg me Ravi & Beas Waters Triouuai was pubiisiied in the Gaelic ofindia Md; Nn S 0 16901,) dated the 2nd April 1986 and subsequently amended vide No. S O. 666(E) dated the 10th June, 1003, and the period within which the Tribunal was required to forwardits further report to the Central Government was extended fromtime to time vide No, 5.0, 905(5) dated the 5th August, 2003, SO. 889(E) dated the 5th August, 2004, SO. 166(E) dated the 4th February, 2005 and SO, 1093(E) dated the 4th August, 2005. 1 and Published by the Controller of Publications, uerni-r “1054. -- 2 of 2 --
